title: Private Wine & Watercolor Night
description: Enjoy a cozy evening of wine, snacks, and watercolor painting hosted at a private home. All skill levels welcome — no experience needed, just good vibes.

title: Tide Pool Exploration with a Marine Biologist
description: A guided tide pool adventure for up to 8 guests led by a local marine biologist. Learn about Pacific Northwest sea life up close — perfect for families or curious adults.

title: VIP Dinner for 4 at a Local Restaurant
description: An unforgettable dining experience for four at a beloved Seattle restaurant. Includes a reserved table, multi-course tasting menu, and a bottle of wine.

title: Weekend Getaway — Cabin on the Olympic Peninsula
description: Two nights in a private cabin surrounded by old-growth forest near the Olympic National Park. Includes firewood, kayak rental, and a trail guide.

title: Commissioned Watercolor Portrait
description: A custom watercolor portrait of your family, pet, or home by a talented local artist. Delivered as an archival print, ready to frame.

title: Sailing Day on Puget Sound
description: Set sail on Puget Sound with an experienced skipper for a half-day adventure for up to 6 guests. Includes snacks, drinks, and stunning views of the Olympics.

title: Brewery Tour & Tasting for 6
description: A private behind-the-scenes tour of a local craft brewery followed by a guided tasting flight. A great outing for a group of beer-loving adults.

title: Seattle Seahawks Season Tickets (2 Games)
description: Two tickets to two regular-season Seahawks home games at Lumen Field. Section, row, and game dates included in full auction listing.
